I'd be happy to help you with your issue.

To track the status of your order, I recommend checking the carrier's website or using the Stryde app under the "My Orders" section. If the tracking information is not updating, it's possible that there may be a delay in delivery.

However, since your order has been placed almost 17 days ago and the tracking hasn't updated in a week, I would suggest reaching out to our support team at support@stryde.in or through the in-app chat. I hope this helps, and please let me know if there's anything else I can do to assist you.

# Stryde Returns Policy

At Stryde, we want every customer to feel confident about their purchase. That is why we offer a generous 30-day return window from the date of delivery. If your sneakers, app

Partial refunds may apply in cases where the returned item shows signs of use, missing tags, or is returned without original packaging. You will be notified of any deductions before the refund is fina

rag.grounded_answer:
Dear Refund Inquiry,

We apologize for the inconvenience you've experienced with your order, ORD-7741. We understand that being unable to track your package is frustrating, especially when it's been over two weeks.

However, we would like to inform you that our returns policy does not cover lost packages due to reasons beyond our control. In such cases, we can only offer a refund or replacement once the issue has been resolved with the courier service.

We are willing to assist you in resolving this matter and will initiate an investigation with the courier service. If your package is indeed lost, we will process a full refund for your order as soon as possible.

Please allow us some time to look into this further and we will be in touch with an update within 48 hours. You can also track the status of your refund through our app or by writing to refunds@stryde.in.

We appreciate your patience and understanding in this matter.

Best regards,
Stryde Customer Service

Here is how our sizes map across standards. A Stryde size 6 corresponds to UK 6 and EU 39. Size 7 maps to UK 7 and EU 40. Size 8 is UK 8 and EU 41. Size 9 is UK 9 and EU 42. Size 10 is UK 10 and EU 44
to UK 9, 28 cm to UK 10, and 29 cm to UK 11. We recommend measuring both feet, as it is common for one foot to be slightly larger — always go with the larger measurement.
